## Locale

Which locale file are you updating?

## Relationship to the language community

Describe your fluency and community context.

## Terms adapted

List culturally sensitive terms and how you translated them.

## Self-check

- [ ] I did not use auto-translation output.
- [ ] I preserved all keys from `en.json`.
- [ ] I kept cultural meaning aligned with "savings circle" intent.
